productDisplayName: Vans Men Black Half Cab Shoes
description: Style Note A great tie up shoe from vans, so comfortable, practical and durable you'll want to wear it every day. Built by skateboarders, for skateboarders, but loved by all for the perfect blend of classic cool and modern slick style. If you don't yet own a pair then this is a good place to start, and if you're already a Vans fan there's always room for one more great shoe in your closet. With a conservative upper, this slip on will coordinate with all your outfits, while the lining gives this shoe a little stylish lift.Product Details Round blunt black shoe with velvet overlays and lace up styling Padded tongue and mouth Overlay at the heel collar Brand name on the back, on the lasting Slightly raised at the ankle     PU midsole for better shock absorption Rubber outsole  with reverse waffle patterned grooves for better grip  Material and Care Fabric, synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
